/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vulkan_setup.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../vulkan_setup  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../vendor/tinyobjloader/libtinyobjloader.a ../vendor/glm/glm/libglm.a ../vendor/GLFW/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreFoundation /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib
